Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Continued To Nov-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Jonas for and with Cornelius Moore.

The Court stated that the issue is diligence in searching out heirs, that an Investigator was engaged to do that and asks if there is anything else reasonable to do. Mr. Jonas stated that he does not think there is anything else for the Investigator to do and that he is satisfied that the Investigator was skilled to take on the task. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Dec-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
